summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical is selected because the job marks this as a mixed PR inventory shard. Deterministic validation requires the validator-flagged security-sensitive targets to use route_security, so those refs are quarantined for central security handling; hydrated closed PRs remain skipped as already closed.
